_note: Pouch Radar v1 — a curated, dated snapshot. STRENGTHS (mg/pouch), FLAVOUR style/counts and PACK COUNTS are now REAL, curated from public manufacturer product pages + the free Haypp Nicotine Pouch Report 2025 + reputable retailer/comparison listings — each row carries a source ref + a confidence (UK = HIGH; Sweden = MED, wider ranges aggregated from review/retailer sites; Denmark = MED, the post-cap surviving-SKU naming leans on a retailer guide + sik.dk). Per-can PRICES, online bestseller RANKS, and the derived PRICE-PER-MG remain illustrative* placeholders — there is no ToS-permitted price source yet (the paid Haypp feed / a nicotine-pouches.org snapshot is the upgrade path; the crawler scripts/crawl-radar.ts stays gated). COVERAGE (disclosed, not silently omitted): the board tracks XQS (STG), VELO (BAT), ZYN (PMI) and Nordic Spirit (JTI); ZYN is now included in Denmark. Nordic Spirit's Denmark availability post-cap is UNVERIFIED, so it is deliberately left out of the DK board rather than faked. On! (Altria) and smaller brands are not yet tracked.

sources.name: Haypp Nicotine Pouch Report 2025
sources.use: UK market structure + leaderboard (VELO #1, Nordic Spirit #2; mint = 58% of cans) — the strongest public spec source
sources.tos: Free published report — used as a cited source, not crawled.

sources.name: Manufacturer & retailer product listings
sources.use: per-brand strengths, flavour ranges & pack counts (zyn.com, northerner, snusdaddy, thesnusoutlet, sik.dk for the DK cap)
sources.tos: Public product-spec pages — curated by hand + dated, never request-time scraped. UK HIGH / SE-DK MED confidence.

sources.name: Haypp Media & Insights
sources.use: real per-can price + online bestseller rank (the illustrative fields)
sources.tos: ToS read PENDING — automated collection gated; the paid Media & Insights feed is the clean fallback (build-plan §4).

markets.name: Sweden
markets.note: World's largest pouch market. XQS is #2 (share 7.8%→13.6% since 2024).

markets.name: United Kingdom
markets.note: XQS focus market — sales doubled in Q4 2025; convenience channel fastest-growing.

markets.name: Denmark
markets.note: 9 mg/pouch cap + tobacco/menthol-only flavours in force Apr 2026 — flavour-led SKUs delisted.

prices.flavourStyle: fruit/fusion (Cola Lime, Fizzy Peach) + mint hedge

events.text: Denmark 9 mg cap + tobacco/menthol-only flavours in force — XQS flavour-led SKUs delisted in DK.
France oral-nicotine ban in force — France removed from XQS's expansion map.
XQS Sweden share 12.3% (Q4 2025) → 13.6% (Q1 2026), up from 7.8% in 2024; XQS volume +38% vs +21% category.
XQS entering the mint segment — an explicit hedge against flavour regulation.
STG discontinued third-party ZYN distribution (NAOR) — drove NGP organic −17%.
